auth.signUpAgreement: By signing up, you agree to our
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetEmailSentDesc: Check your inbox for a password reset link. It may take a few minutes to arrive.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

welcome.description: A wellness app that gives you back your time. Mix and relax your life with one simple fact: you're enjoying the best of yourself.
welcome.footerHint: Capture moments • Plan your day • Live better

feed.title: VYV
feed.emptyDescription: Share your first moment and start connecting with others

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Discover wellness content
explore.createTemplateDescription: Save your favorite activities as a template and apply them to your calendar in one tap

unavailable.title: Not available yet
unavailable.error: Unable to open link. Please try again.

empty.saveContent: Save content to improve your recommendations
empty.tryAnother: Try another title, author or keyword.

profile.title: Profile
profile.useQuickCamera: Use quick camera to get started
profile.followToSee: Follow this user to see their content
profile.requestSentInfo: Your request has been sent. You'll be notified when it's accepted.

settings.title: Settings
settings.privateProfileDesc: Only your followers can see your content
settings.autoSaveCapturesDesc: Instant photos will be automatically saved to your gallery
settings.deleteAccountDesc: This action cannot be undone. All your data, posts, and connections will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteAccountRequested: Account deletion requested. We'll process your request shortly.
settings.logOutAllDevicesDesc: End sessions on all other devices

devices.title: Health Devices
devices.subtitle: Connect health platforms to personalize your day
devices.autoSyncDesc: Your health data syncs automatically when a platform is connected.
devices.vyvIntelligenceDesc: VYV connects to health platforms — not directly to wearables. Your devices feed data through Apple Health or Google Fit, and VYV interprets it to personalize your day.

platforms.appleHealthDesc: Access steps, activity, sleep and heart rate from all your Apple devices
platforms.googleFitDesc: Access health and activity data from Android devices and wearables

devices.insightsDescription: VYV reads permitted data only and interprets it to help you flow through your day.

insights.focusModeDesc: Adjusts focus sessions based on your energy and sleep quality
insights.recoveryDesc: Suggests lighter days when your body needs rest
insights.dailyFlowDesc: Adapts notifications and reminders to your rhythm

watch.title: Watch & Wearable (V1)
watch.description: Simple, calm interactions — no complex watch app. Just what matters.
watch.exampleBody: 25 minutes of deep focus. Breathe and begin.

watchNotifs.title: Watch Notifications
watchNotifs.description: VYV uses your watch as a gentle companion. Minimal, contextual, calm — never intrusive.
watchNotifs.ruleMaxDaily: Maximum 3–5 notifications per day to protect your attention
watchNotifs.ruleRecoveryOverride: Recovery mode can override focus suggestions when your body needs rest
watchNotifs.ruleTapToOpen: Tap any notification to open VYV on your phone
watchNotifs.ruleAIDriven: AI analyzes stress, energy, and calendar to choose the right moment
watchNotifs.aiDescription: Generate contextual notifications based on your stress levels, energy state, and calendar.
watchNotifs.limitReached: Daily notification limit reached. Your attention is protected.

focus.label: VYV · Focus
focus.title: 25 min of deep focus
focus.desc: Triggered when optimal focus conditions are detected

recovery.label: VYV · Recovery
recovery.title: Your body needs a lighter pace today
recovery.desc: Activated by poor sleep, strain, or stress signals

transition.label: VYV · Transition
transition.title: Focus block completed
transition.desc: Sent when a focus block ends

calendar.label: VYV · Today
calendar.title: Long meetings ahead
calendar.desc: Contextual nudges based on your day structure

compatible.title: Compatible wearables
compatible.description: These devices feed data through health platforms that VYV reads from.

devices.moreDevicesDesc: More devices supported through health platforms like Apple Health. Additional integrations coming soon.

camera.title: Quick Capture
camera.photoSaved: Photo saved to your calendar and profile
camera.autoSavePromptDesc: We can automatically save every photo you take to your gallery.

post.caption: Caption
post.deletePostDesc: This action cannot be undone. The post will be permanently deleted.

errors.captureFirst: You must capture a photo first
errors.captionTooLong: Caption cannot be more than 140 characters

captureDetail.deleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. The capture will be permanently deleted.

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.name: Name
editProfile.usernameChanges: You can only change your username 2 times per year
editProfile.usernameChangesRemaining: You have {{count}} username change(s) remaining this year
editProfile.usernameChangesLimit: You've reached the limit of 2 username changes per year

errors.handleTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.handleTooLong: Username must be 20 characters or less
errors.handleInvalidChars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores

errors.endBeforeStart: End date must be after start date

daySummary.noActivity: No activity recorded for this day

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.

devices.title: Connect your health & activity devices
devices.description: Sync your data from wearables and fitness apps to get personalized insights and track your progress.
devices.fitnessApps: Your favorite fitness or activity apps
devices.privacyNote: Your data stays private. You can manage connections anytime in Settings.

security.title: Verify your account
security.description: Complete verification to protect your account and access all features.
security.emailVerifiedMessage: Your email has been verified successfully
security.emailNotVerifiedMessage: Check your inbox and click the verification link
security.emailNotVerifiedYet: Your email hasn't been verified yet. Check your inbox.
security.verifyWarning: You must verify your email to continue. Check your inbox or spam folder.
security.accountSecured: Your account is verified and protected

recommendations.title: For You
recommendations.selectGoal: What do you need right now?
recommendations.empty: No recommendations yet. Try selecting a goal.
recommendations.dataControlsDescription: Choose what data the AI can use to personalize your recommendations
recommendations.privacyNotice: Your data is used only to personalize recommendations and is never shared.

mediaConnections.bannerDescription: Connect your music services for personalized, healthy recommendations.
mediaConnections.readOnlyNotice: We only read your preferences. We never post or modify your content.
mediaConnections.credentialsNeeded: Platform credentials are not configured yet. Coming soon.
mediaConnections.spotifyDescription: Your favorite artists, genres, and playlists
mediaConnections.healthyVerifiedDesc: Filter harmful content and prioritize verified sources
mediaConnections.settingsDescription: Manage your connected services and control what data is used.
mediaConnections.dataAccessDescription: Control what information AI can use to personalize.
mediaConnections.mediaDataDesc: Genres, artists, and playlists from your connected services

sectionVisibility.title: Profile Sections
sectionVisibility.description: Control which sections are visible to others

socialBudget.modalDescription: You've reached your daily social time. Want to extend 5 more minutes—consciously?
socialBudget.completedSubtitle1: Thank you for protecting your attention today.
socialBudget.completedSubtitle2: Choosing when to stop is also progress.
socialBudget.completedSubtitle3: Less noise now, more clarity later.
socialBudget.limitReachedDesc: You've used your social time for today
socialBudget.settingsDescription: Set how much time you spend on social daily
socialBudget.unlimitedHint: No daily limit is set. Scroll freely.
socialBudget.limitHint: You can use up to {{minutes}} minutes per day.

motivational.message1: Taking a pause is also progress.
motivational.message2: You chose focus. That already matters.
motivational.message4: Less noise now, more energy later.
motivational.message5: Your attention matters. Thanks for protecting it.

perfectDay.title: Your Perfect Day
perfectDay.subtitle: Suggested plan for today based on your sleep and energy.

aiOptions.title: Choose Your Routine
aiOptions.subtitle: 3 options based on your profile and preferences

follow.unfollowDescription: You will stop following this user. If their profile is private, you'll need to request again.
follow.cancelRequestDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel your follow request?

exploreOnboarding.title: Personalized recommendations
exploreOnboarding.description: VYV analyzes your calendar and activities to suggest content that fits your moment of the day.
exploreOnboarding.spotifyDesc: Suggests music based on your real tastes
exploreOnboarding.privacyNote: We only access read-only data. We never post or modify anything on your accounts.

moderation.accountSuspended: Your account has been suspended for repeated community guideline violations.

travelMode.title: Travel Mode
travelMode.description: Adapt routines and schedules to your current location
travelMode.differentTimezone: You seem to be in a different timezone ({{current}} vs {{home}})
travelMode.calendarDetected: We detected travel events in today's calendar

status.label: Detection mode
status.description: Off disables travel detection, Auto detects automatically, On forces travel mode

autoTimezone.label: Auto-shift schedule to local time
autoTimezone.description: Automatically adjust your routine schedule to match the local timezone

intensity.label: Travel intensity
intensity.description: Controls how much your routine adapts while traveling
intensity.low: Low — minimal activity, focus on rest

descs.weekStructure: How to plan with the 80/20 method

tour.welcomeBody: VYV is your system for living with intention. Let me show you the essentials in 30 seconds.
tour.homeBody: Your day at a glance: energy, habits, and direction. Everything starts here.
tour.exploreBody: Recommendations aligned to your rhythm. Less noise, more value.
tour.focusBody: Your space for presence. Capture your moment and return to what matters.
tour.calendarBody: Organize your life visually. Events, rhythm, and balance in one place.
tour.profileBody: Your progress is yours. You choose what to share and what to keep private.

tips.exploreCardBody: Save what serves you well. Avoid what only distracts.
tips.focusCaptureBody: This is to remind you who you are today.
tips.calendarAddBody: Plan with clarity. Fewer decisions later.
tips.profileEditBody: Adjust what you want to show. The rest can stay private.
tips.profileShareBody: Share your profile when you decide.

focusIntro.subtitle: No endless editing. No social pressure. Just presence.

friends.title: Find your people
friends.body: Connect with people you already know. You can do it now or later.
friends.settingsHint: You can change this in Settings.

findFriends.title: Find friends
findFriends.noPermission: Without permission we can't suggest contacts. You can search by username or invite with a link.

network.offline: You're offline. Keep focusing. We'll sync when you're back.
network.slow: Slow connection detected. Loading lighter content.

contextHelp.feedHeaderBody: See posts from people you follow. Tap + to capture your moment.
contextHelp.feedSearchBody: Find friends and discover new accounts to follow.
contextHelp.exploreBody: Music, podcasts, yoga and more — selected for your vibe. Tap a card to open it.
contextHelp.calendarBody: Organize your day with time blocks. Use + to create an event or switch views.
contextHelp.profileBody: Your daily progress, captures and stats. Tap 'Edit profile' to customize your account.
contextHelp.profileStatsBody: Steps, workout, sleep and screen time. Tap each card to see the breakdown.

contextualRecs.explorerSubtitle: Based on your browsing and schedule
